title: barleria rigida var. spinissima
intro: Barleria rigida var. spinissima, also known as the 'hairy shrub' or 'needle bush', is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
